Agency 
56 = Ocularist 
57 = All Other 
58 = Institutions for mental disease 

Null/missing = source value is missing or 
unknown 

COMMENT: There are up to three lock-in providers. The LCKIN_PRVDR_ID_# corresponds with a variable indicating 
the types of services that are locked-in (refer to LCKIN_PRVDR_TYPE_CD_#).
